critic_raw:
Issue 1: Tax-refund seasonality makes the before-after comparison unreliable for model attribution.
Issue 2: Dialer vendor switch changed queue composition simultaneously with model deployment.
Issue 3: Manager overrides partially bypassed model ranking.
Issue 4: No same-period control group exists to serve as counterfactual.
defender_raw: All four issues are valid methodological concerns. The memo's causal language overstates what the design can support. The right path forward is a concurrent champion-challenger design. Contactability features used in the model are operationally valid — the evaluation design is the problem, not feature selection.

debate_rounds.critic: The defender's concession is complete on the methodological points. I want to clarify one thing: the defender mentions 'contactability features' — I am not raising any concern about the model's features. My critique is entirely about the evaluation design. The model's features are not at issue. The question is whether the board memo's interpretation of the before-after result is valid, and we both agree it is not.
debate_rounds.defender: Agreed. The feature choice is not under dispute. The evaluation design is the sole issue. Recommend the champion-challenger test to resolve all four design issues simultaneously. Concede that the memo's causal attribution is not supported.

adjudication_raw: Both parties agreed on all issues after one exchange. The defender appropriately distinguished feature validity (not at issue) from evaluation design validity (the actual problem). Verdict: empirical_test_agreed by full mutual concession.
all_issues_raised: Issue 2: dialer vendor change alters queue
Issue 3: manager overrides bypass model rank

empirical_test.condition: Concurrent randomized champion-challenger test within the same calendar period: model-ranked vs. legacy-ranked queues, same dialer, override rates tracked by condition
empirical_test.supports_critique_if: No material difference in recovery per account between concurrent conditions
empirical_test.supports_defense_if: Materially higher recovery per account in model-ranked condition under concurrent same-period conditions
empirical_test.ambiguous_if: Positive but modest model effect with most of reported gain attributable to seasonal or dialer factors
